metadata.title: Local REST API Second Brain MCP Extension
metadata.description: Local REST API Second Brain MCP Extension Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: You can access Obsidian Local REST API via the following URLs:
ast.target: \n      您可以通过以下URL访问Obsidian本地REST API：\n

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Comprehensive documentation of what API endpoints are available can be found in the online docs.
ast.target: 关于可用API端点的全面文档可以在 在线文档中找到。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Your certificate has expired! You must re-generate your certificate below by pressing the "Re-generate Certificates" button below in order to connect securely to this API.
ast.target: 您的证书已过期！ 您必须通过按下下方的“重新生成证书”按钮来重新生成您的证书， 以便安全地连接到此API。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 自定义模型路径（请在下方指定）

ast.name: error
ast.source: ACTION NEEDED: require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() is not supported in your version of Node

ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite 警告：对字符串进行decode()已弃用。请参阅 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: error
ast.source: iconv-lite warning: javascript files use encoding different from utf-8. See https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings for more info.
ast.target: iconv-lite 警告：JavaScript文件使用了非UTF-8编码。更多信息请参见 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings。

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Second Brain MCP] Failed to auto-resolve plugin directory from vault adapter:
ast.target: [Second Brain MCP] 从保险库适配器自动解析插件目录失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Second Brain MCP] Initial search engine startup failed:
ast.target: [Second Brain MCP] 初始搜索引擎启动失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Second Brain MCP] Failed to load embeddings cache from disk:
ast.target: [Second Brain MCP] 从磁盘加载嵌入缓存失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Second Brain MCP] Failed to save embeddings cache to disk:
ast.target: [Second Brain MCP] 将嵌入缓存保存到磁盘失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Second Brain MCP] Failed to clear embeddings cache:
ast.target: [Second Brain MCP] 清除嵌入缓存失败：

ast.name: info
ast.source: No vocoder specified, using default HifiGan vocoder.
ast.target: 未指定声码器，使用默认的HifiGan声码器。

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每年笔记设置！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will cause your certificate,
        private key, public key, and API key to be regenerated.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target: 按下此按钮将导致您的证书、私钥、公钥和API密钥被重新生成。按下此按钮时，此设置面板将关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will cause your certificate,
        private key,  and public key to be re-generated, but your API key will remain unchanged. 
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target: 按下此按钮将导致您的证书、私钥和公钥被重新生成，但您的API密钥将保持不变。按下此按钮时，此设置面板将关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will reset this plugin's
        settings to defaults.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target: 按下此按钮将把此插件的设置重置为默认值。按下此按钮时，此设置面板将关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced settings are dangerous and may make your environment less secure.
ast.target: 高级设置具有危险性，可能会降低您的环境安全性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
This controls whether the HTTPs server is enabled.  You almost certainly want to leave this switch in its default state ('on'),
          but may find it useful to turn this switch off for
          troubleshooting.
ast.target:
此选项控制是否启用HTTPS服务器。您几乎肯定希望将此开关保持在其默认状态（'开'），
          但可能会发现将其关闭对于故障排除很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A brief sentence or phrase describing the knowledge domain of this wiki (e.g. 'Software Engineering Knowledge Base'). This is dynamically injected into the MCP tool descriptions so the LLM knows what specific knowledge is hosted here.
ast.target: 描述此维基知识领域的简短句子或短语（例如“软件工程知识库”）。这会动态注入到MCP工具描述中，以便LLM知道此处托管了哪些特定知识。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the local model used to generate embeddings for semantic search.
ast.target: 选择用于生成语义搜索嵌入的本地模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the Hugging Face model path (e.g. Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2).
ast.target: 输入Hugging Face模型路径（例如Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include detailed execution logs in the tool response (used for debugging).
ast.target: 在工具响应中包含详细的执行日志（用于调试）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete the stored embedding vectors from disk and re-index your files.
ast.target: 从磁盘删除存储的嵌入向量并重新索引您的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all settings to their original factory defaults. This will reset the embedding model, custom paths, wiki purpose, and path pattern filters.
ast.target: 将所有设置恢复为原始出厂默认值。这将重置嵌入模型、自定义路径、维基用途和路径模式过滤器。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Wiki 用途 / 知识领域

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WebAssembly multi-threading is not supported in the current environment. Falling back to single-threading.
ast.target: 当前环境不支持 WebAssembly 多线程。回退到单线程。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to determine content-length from response headers. Will expand buffer when needed.
ast.target: 无法从响应头确定 content-length。将在需要时扩展缓冲区。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: An error occurred while opening the browser cache:
ast.target: 打开浏览器缓存时发生错误：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 读取 WASM 二进制文件失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 读取 WASM 工厂失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 预加载 WASM 二进制文件失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 预加载 WASM 工厂失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `max_length` is ignored when `padding: true` and there is no truncation strategy. To pad to max length, use `padding: 'max_length'`.
ast.target: 当 `padding: true` 且没有截断策略时，`max_length` 将被忽略。要填充到最大长度，请使用 `padding: 'max_length'`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Truncation was not explicitly activated but `max_length` is provided a specific value, please use `truncation: true` to explicitly truncate examples to max length.
ast.target: 截断未被显式激活，但 `max_length` 提供了特定值，请使用 `truncation: true` 来显式地将示例截断到最大长度。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: `MarianTokenizer` is not yet supported by Hugging Face's "fast" tokenizers library. Therefore, you may experience slightly inaccurate results.
ast.target: 警告：`MarianTokenizer` 尚未被 Hugging Face 的“快速”分词器库支持。因此，您可能会遇到略微不准确的结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: `XLMTokenizer` is not yet supported by Hugging Face's "fast" tokenizers library. Therefore, you may experience slightly inaccurate results.
ast.target: 警告：`XLMTokenizer` 尚未被 Hugging Face 的“快速”分词器库支持。因此，您可能会遇到略微不准确的结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Attempting to extract features for audio longer than 30 seconds. If using a pipeline to extract transcript from a long audio clip, remember to specify `chunk_length_s` and/or `stride_length_s`.
ast.target: 正在尝试提取超过 30 秒音频的特征。如果使用管道从长音频片段中提取转录文本，请记住指定 `chunk_length_s` 和/或 `stride_length_s`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `label_ids_to_fuse` unset. No instance will be fused.
ast.target: `label_ids_to_fuse` 未设置。不会融合任何实例。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You are using PaliGemma without a text prefix. It will perform as a picture-captioning model.
ast.target: 您正在使用不带文本前缀的 PaliGemma。它将作为图片描述模型运行。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `do_sample` changed to false because `temperature: 0` implies greedy sampling (always selecting the most likely token), which is incompatible with `do_sample: true`.
ast.target: `do_sample` 已更改为 false，因为 `temperature: 0` 意味着贪婪采样（始终选择最可能的标记），这与 `do_sample: true` 不兼容。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No language specified - defaulting to English (en).
ast.target: 未指定语言 - 默认为英语 (en)。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: <|notimestamps|> prompt token is removed from generation_config since `return_timestamps` is set to `true`.
ast.target: `<|notimestamps|>` 提示标记已从 generation_config 中移除，因为 `return_timestamps` 设置为 `true`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Token-level timestamps may not be reliable for task 'translate'.
ast.target: 对于任务 'translate'，标记级时间戳可能不可靠。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `num_frames` has not been set, meaning the entire audio will be analyzed. This may lead to inaccurate token-level timestamps for short audios (< 30 seconds).
ast.target: `num_frames` 尚未设置，这意味着将分析整个音频。这可能导致短音频（< 30 秒）的标记级时间戳不准确。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Model config has no `median_filter_width`, using default value of 7.
ast.target: 模型配置中没有 `median_filter_width`，使用默认值 7。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not find 'entailment' in label2id mapping. Using 2 as entailment_id.
ast.target: 在 label2id 映射中找不到 'entailment'。使用 2 作为 entailment_id。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not find 'contradiction' in label2id mapping. Using 0 as contradiction_id.
ast.target: 在 label2id 映射中找不到 'contradiction'。使用 0 作为 contradiction_id。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `language` parameter is not yet supported for `wav2vec2` models, defaulting to "English".
ast.target: `wav2vec2` 模型尚不支持 `language` 参数，默认为 \"English\"。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `task` parameter is not yet supported for `wav2vec2` models, defaulting to "transcribe".
ast.target: `wav2vec2` 模型尚不支持 `task` 参数，默认为 \"transcribe\"。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Second Brain MCP settings successfully restored to defaults!
ast.target: Second Brain MCP 设置已成功恢复为默认值！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query to run against the wiki
ast.target: 针对 wiki 运行的搜索查询

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of root files that should be included from the search (default: 5, minimum: 1)
ast.target: 应从搜索中包含的最大根文件数（默认：5，最小：1）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of connections to traverse per node, ranked by similarity to query (default: 2)
ast.target: 每个节点要遍历的最大连接数，按与查询的相似度排序（默认：2）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum BFS depth to traverse (0 = root nodes only, 1 = direct connections, etc., default: 2)
ast.target: 要遍历的最大 BFS 深度（0 = 仅根节点，1 = 直接连接等，默认：2）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Strict cap on the total number of unique pages returned (default: 20)
ast.target: 返回的唯一页面总数的严格上限（默认：20）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The path or filename of the wiki note (if the extension or folder paths is omitted, the matching will be based on best effort)
ast.target: wiki 笔记的路径或文件名（如果省略扩展名或文件夹路径，匹配将基于最佳努力）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate is not valid yet or has expired.
ast.target: 证书尚未生效或已过期。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate has an unsupported critical extension.
ast.target: 证书具有不支持的关键扩展。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate keyUsage or basicConstraints conflict or indicate that the certificate is not a CA. If the certificate is the only one in the chain or isn't the first then the certificate must be a valid CA.
ast.target: 证书 keyUsage 或 basicConstraints 冲突或表明该证书不是 CA。如果证书是链中唯一的证书或不是第一个，则该证书必须是有效的 CA。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate basicConstraints indicates the certificate is not a CA.
ast.target: 证书 basicConstraints 表明该证书不是 CA。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 证书 basicConstraints pathLenConstraint 违规。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 应用程序拒绝了该证书。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected message. Received TLS record out of order.
ast.target: 意外消息。收到的 TLS 记录顺序错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: TLS version change is disallowed during renegotiation.
ast.target: 重新协商期间不允许更改 TLS 版本。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 不兼容的 TLS 版本。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid Certificate message. Message too short.
ast.target: 无效的 Certificate 消息。消息太短。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid key parameters. Only RSA is supported.
ast.target: 无效的密钥参数。仅支持 RSA。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 ServerHelloDone 消息。长度无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No server certificate provided. Not enough security.
ast.target: 未提供服务器证书。安全性不足。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 收到无效的 ChangeCipherSpec 消息。

ast.name: message
ast.target: Finished 消息中的 verify_data 无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not decrypt record or bad MAC.
ast.target: 无法解密记录或 MAC 错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot initiate handshake as a server.
ast.target: 无法作为服务器发起握手。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid params: path must be a string
ast.target: 无效参数：path 必须是字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid params: query must be a string
ast.target: 无效参数：query 必须是字符串

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, the following request will return all notes in the root directory of your vault:
ast.target: 例如，以下请求将返回您保险库根目录中的所有笔记：

ast.name: text
ast.source:
Use of this software is licensed to you under the
          MIT license, and it is important that you understand that 
          this license provides you with no warranty.
          For the complete license text please see
ast.target:
本软件根据 MIT 许可证授权给您使用，重要的是您需要理解该许可证不提供任何担保。
          完整的许可证文本请参见

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: The selected model is different from the one currently running and cached. You must click 'Clear Cache' below to apply your new model selection.
ast.target: 警告：所选模型与当前运行和缓存的模型不同。您必须点击下方的“清除缓存”以应用新的模型选择。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure regular expressions or prefixes to specify which notes are included or excluded from your search index.
ast.target: 配置正则表达式或前缀，以指定哪些笔记被包含或排除在您的搜索索引之外。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: Changing these filters alters which files are indexed. To apply changes immediately, use the 'Clear Cache' button below to trigger a full re-index.
ast.target: 注意：更改这些过滤器会改变被索引的文件。要立即应用更改，请使用下方的“清除缓存”按钮触发完全重新索引。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: The paths above are only for `query_wiki` and the `get_wiki` tool can return any document if the correct path is provided.
ast.target: 注意：上述路径仅适用于 `query_wiki`，而 `get_wiki` 工具可以返回任何文档，只要提供了正确的路径。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: For a document to be returned by the `query_wiki` tool, it must be included by the "Allow Path Patterns" and not excluded by the "Exclude Path Patterns".
ast.target: 注意：要使文档能被 `query_wiki` 工具返回，它必须被“允许路径模式”包含，且不被“排除路径模式”排除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: Due to browser security constraints in Obsidian, local embedding generation is limited to a single CPU core. Initial indexing or re-indexing may be slow, but subsequent cached queries will be very fast.
ast.target: 注意：由于 Obsidian 中的浏览器安全限制，本地嵌入生成仅限于单个 CPU 核心。初始索引或重新索引可能较慢，但后续的缓存查询将非常快。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Disabled.  You can enable this in 'Settings' below.
ast.target: 已禁用。您可以在下方的“设置”中启用此功能。
